response.description_short: Anysphere is the developer of Cursor, an AI code editor that has gained enterprise traction.
response.description_long: Anysphere develops Cursor, an AI-powered code editor designed to assist software developers with code generation and editing. The company's product has seen increasing adoption in enterprise environments, indicating growing interest in AI-assisted development tools.
response.grounding_descriptor: developer of Cursor, an AI code editor
